name: 每日时间管理 8:30
description: Cloud Automation：拉取企业微信日程/待办，生成时间管理简报并推送到企微机器人。

prompts:
You are a Cursor Cloud Automation scheduled job.

0. **First**, run and wait for success: `bun run scripts/ensure-wecom-ws.ts` (WebSocket preflight; auto reconnect/retry up to 3 times, 5 min apart). Exit non-zero if it fails.
1. Read and strictly follow `config/automation-prompts/daily-time-master.txt` in this repository.
2. Use wecom-cli to fetch WeCom schedules and todos (Asia/Shanghai dates). Ensure wecom-cli is on PATH; use Cloud Agent secrets for auth if needed.
3. Generate the full time-management brief in WeCom Markdown per that file.
4. **Must push** to WeCom bot:
   `bun run scripts/push-wecom-markdown.ts --title "⏰ 时间管理简报 · YYYY-MM-DD" --text "<full markdown>"`
   (push script includes the same 3×5min WebSocket guard)
5. Exit non-zero if push fails. Do not only print to chat — delivery is via the push script.

Required env (Cloud Agent secrets or wecom/.env): WECOM_BOT_ID, WECOM_BOT_SECRET, WECOM_CHAT_ID (default LiuHaoCheng).
